name: norma-tool-android
description: Android beta build of norma tool.

scripts.android:sync: npm run mobile:build-web && cap sync android
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:release: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && cap open android
